final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire [7:0] data_in,  
    input wire we,  
    input wire re,  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [7:0] sram;  
     
    always @(*) begin
  if (we) begin sram <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if (re) begin data_out <= sram ; end
  end  
endmodule
